<!-- Auto-generated by codebase-harness -->

# Rules & Codebase Sync

## Single-Source Contract

ALL rule content lives in `.ai/harness/rules/{namespace}/{name}.md`.
Claude wrappers (`.claude/rules/{ns}/{name}.md`) and Cursor wrappers (`.cursor/rules/{ns}-{name}.mdc`) are DERIVED — they have the same body plus agent-specific YAML frontmatter.

## NEVER

- Edit wrapper files directly — edit `.ai/harness/rules/` centralized source
- Add content to wrappers that is not in the centralized source
- Let wrapper bodies diverge from centralized bodies

## Sync Trigger

When updating any centralized rule:
1. Edit `.ai/harness/rules/{ns}/{name}.md`
2. Update `.claude/rules/{ns}/{name}.md` (same body, keep YAML frontmatter)
3. Update `.cursor/rules/{ns}-{name}.mdc` (same body, keep YAML frontmatter)
4. Reference in `RULES.md` index

## Wrapper Format

Claude wrapper:
```markdown
---
description: {same as centralized}
globs: ["{from centralized}"]
alwaysApply: {true|false}
---
<!-- Centralized rule: .ai/harness/rules/{ns}/{name}.md -->
<!-- Auto-generated by codebase-harness. DO NOT EDIT directly. -->
{body from centralized}
```
